name: Jack Skellington [Fortnite]
description:
"Legend of Halloween Town."

I can't wait for Halloween this year!

Both Tim Burton and Disney rightfully own The Nightmare Before Christmas.

[NOTE: I also sadly do not have this skin, it was last seen in February of this year, but I wasn't around. Hopefully, he'll come back in September or October!]

UPDATE NOTE: Months later when I found out Fortnite brought back Jack along with Sally and the pumpkin king, I have now officially bought the Jack Skellington skin with my own V-bucks!
